name: Attendance
description: Geofence-based attendance marking and reporting. Check-in hot path + agent tools + admin explorer.

tools.name: mark_attendance
tools.description: Mark the current user present or absent

tools.name: who_is_present
tools.description: List employees present today (checked in), with names

tools.name: who_is_absent
tools.description: List enrolled employees absent today (no check-in), with names

tools.name: attendance_summary
tools.description: Today's present, absent and late lists with names, plus counts

tools.name: who_is_late
tools.description: List employees who checked in late today, with names

tools.name: get_my_status
tools.description: Get the current user's attendance status today

roles.label: Attendance Manager
roles.description: Manage zones, approve attendance, run reports, and make manual entries.

roles.label: Staff
roles.description: Log own check-in/out and view own attendance.

audiences.label: present today
audiences.description: Users with at least one check-in today (approval-independent). Lets other platform features — e.g. Flows — target only people who showed up.
